---
title: "Getting Started"
---

## Local Workflow

1. Activate your Python virtual environment.
2. Run `quarto preview` from the repository root.
3. Open the local URL shown in the terminal.

## Add New Content

- Add concept pages under `content/`.
- Add notebooks under `notebooks/`.
- Link notebook demos from topic pages.

## Suggested Writing Pattern

- Start with a short concept summary.
- Add one small worked example.
- Add references and common pitfalls.
